title: Dual-Threshold Safety Relay Interlock
selected_approach: Two independent hardware comparators (LM393) set to WARNING and FAULT temperature thresholds using resistor voltage dividers on a thermistor signal. WARNING threshold drives an LED + buzzer; FAULT threshold directly de-energises a main power relay (SPDT, 10 A) cutting heater supply independent of MCU. Provides fail-safe hardware protection.
